title: Oil prices fall after Iran state media says deal with US would include restored Hormuz shipping within 30 days, end to US naval blockade
snippet: Oil prices dropped precipitously at ~9 AM ET after Iranian state TV reported MoU draft: Iran would restore Hormuz shipping to pre-war levels within 30 days, US would withdraw military and lift blockade. 14-point document. Iran commits to never pursue nuclear weapons and negotiate enrichment suspension.
tag_reason: 이란 국영TV의 MoU 초안 내용(30일 내 호르무즈 복구, 미군 철수) 최초 보도. 이전 보도된 개괄적 MoU와 달리 구체 조항 공개.
